description: Destructure an observable whose initializer is a larger expression, not a bare identifier (`accumulate(…) ?? getInitialGame()`). The source is hoisted into one synthetic binding (`item = render(<expr>)`) so it's subscribed once and shared, and each field fans off it (`item.pipe(map(item => item.field))`) — the same per-field shape the identifier case emits. A destructured field is then itself an observable binding, so a later read of it lifts.
